narrative:
Bowling Green City has 16,402 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.5 percentage points.
